name: io.github.codespar/mcp-shopee
description: MCP server for Shopee — major LatAm ecommerce marketplace. Shopee Partner API v2 for merchant integrations (orders, products, shipping, returns).

environmentVariables.name: SHOPEE_PARTNER_ID
environmentVariables.description: Shopee Open Platform partner_id (integer) assigned when the app is registered.

environmentVariables.name: SHOPEE_PARTNER_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Shopee partner_key used as the secret for HMAC-SHA256 request signing.

environmentVariables.name: SHOPEE_ACCESS_TOKEN
environmentVariables.description: Merchant access_token obtained via the shop authorization OAuth flow (expires every 4 hours; refresh via refresh_token).

environmentVariables.name: SHOPEE_SHOP_ID
environmentVariables.description: Shop identifier (integer) returned after merchant authorization.
